title: Lunch photo check
script: Please share your lunch photo when convenient. I will score the meal for your diabetes plan and explain what to improve.

title: Morning weigh-in
script: Good morning. If today is your weigh-in day, log your weight before breakfast so the weekly trend stays accurate.

title: Evening BP log
script: If your doctor asked you to monitor BP, sit calmly for a few minutes and log the reading. If you feel severe symptoms, seek medical help.
